opportunities.title: Enterprise IT Modernization and Cloud Migration Services
opportunities.fullParentPathName: DEPT OF DEFENSE.DEPT OF THE ARMY.AMC.USACE.W912DY ENGINEERING AND SUPPORT CENTER HUNTSVILLE
opportunities.description: Application portfolio assessment and cloud migration of approximately 140 legacy mission applications to a DoD-authorized cloud environment at Impact Level 4, with post-migration operations support under an enterprise IT modernization program.

opportunities.title: Legacy Application Re-Platforming and Cloud Hosting Support
opportunities.fullParentPathName: VETERANS AFFAIRS, DEPARTMENT OF.VETERANS AFFAIRS, DEPARTMENT OF.36C10B TECHNOLOGY ACQUISITION CENTER
opportunities.description: Re-platforming of legacy benefits applications and managed cloud hosting in Azure Government, including identity management integration, zero trust alignment, and continuous monitoring.

opportunities.title: Flood Control Levee Rehabilitation, Sacramento District
opportunities.fullParentPathName: DEPT OF DEFENSE.DEPT OF THE ARMY.AMC.USACE.W912PL SACRAMENTO DISTRICT
opportunities.description: Construction for rehabilitation of flood control levees, including embankment repair, riprap placement, slurry cutoff walls, and seepage control structures along the Sacramento River East Levee.

opportunities.title: Janitorial Services, Bruce R. Thompson Courthouse, Reno NV
opportunities.fullParentPathName: GENERAL SERVICES ADMINISTRATION.PUBLIC BUILDINGS SERVICE.PBS R9
opportunities.description: Janitorial and custodial operations including floor care, waste removal, recycling, and restroom sanitation at the Bruce R. Thompson Federal Courthouse in Reno, Nevada.

opportunities.title: Zero Trust Architecture Engineering Support Services
opportunities.fullParentPathName: HOMELAND SECURITY, DEPARTMENT OF.CYBERSECURITY AND INFRASTRUCTURE SECURITY AGENCY
opportunities.description: Engineering support for zero trust architecture implementation, network segmentation, and identity, credential, and access management modernization across federal civilian executive branch networks.

opportunities.title: Environmental Remediation Long-Term Stewardship, Hanford Site
opportunities.fullParentPathName: ENERGY, DEPARTMENT OF.OFFICE OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT.RICHLAND OPERATIONS OFFICE
opportunities.description: Long-term stewardship and environmental remediation including groundwater monitoring, institutional controls, and surveillance and maintenance of remediated waste sites at the Hanford Site.
